The Multivariate Modela presents a B of 0.468, SE of 0.035, OR of 1.645, 95% CI of OR from 1.359 to 2.536, and a P value of < 0.001.

page.content: Group A (≤ 2.13) has no values reported, while Group B (2.13–2.89) has a B of 0.403, SE of 0.048, OR of 1.496, 95% CI of OR from 1.362 to 1.642, and a P value of < 0.001. Group C (≥ 2.89) shows a B of 0.837, SE of 0.203, OR of 2.038, 95% CI of OR from 1.432 to 3.043, and a P value of < 0.001. In Table 2, the headers include Malnourished (n = 152), Nourished (n = 161), Total (n = 313), P value, Odds ratio, and 95% IC, with the body reporting aaiC only as 10 (6.58%), 9 (5.59%), and 19 (6.07%) with a P value of 0.814, Odds ratio of 1.19, and 95% IC of 0.47–3.01. AatA only has 19 (12.50%), 26 (16.15%), and 45 (14.38%) with a P value of 0.421, Odds ratio of 0.74, and 95% IC of 0.39–1.40. AaiC + aatA shows 37 (24.34%), 24 (14.91%), and 61 (19.49%) with a P value of 0.045, Odds ratio of 1.84, and 95% IC of 1.03–3.25. The Total row includes 66 (43.42%), 59 (36.65%), and 125 (39.94%) without a P value or Odds ratio reported.
